summary.intent: Replace the flat NDJSON event log and JSON session state file in the gossamer Claude hook handler with a single SQLite database via Prisma, then migrate existing data and begin building a React Native UI to display session data interactively.
summary.outcome: SQLite/Prisma migration was fully completed and verified: 475 NDJSON events migrated, sessions reconstructed, live hooks confirmed writing to DB. The React Native app was planned but interrupted before any implementation began.

repo: gossamer is a Claude hook handler that logs events and tracks session state; previously used ~/claude-hooks.ndjson for events and ~/.claude/sessions-state.json for state
There is a pre-existing react-native branch in the repo
All 7 hook commands in ~/.claude/settings.json point to the claude-hook-handler binary and needed updating from --events/--state flags to --db
Session state comprises four tables: Session, AgentParent, PendingToolUse, and Event; reconstruct replays all events to rebuild the first three
Per-session markdown files live under ~/.claude/sessions/ alongside the main ~/.claude/sessions.md index

code.finding: dirname must be imported from 'path', not 'fs' — build failed until this was corrected
Prisma 7 breaking change: 'url' field in the datasource block is no longer supported in schema files; must be moved to prisma.config.ts
previewFeatures = ["driverAdapters"] is removed/deprecated in Prisma 7 and must be omitted from the generator block
Prisma 7 requires a separate prisma.config.ts to configure the database URL and driver adapter; this replaces the datasource url in schema.prisma
Changing module/moduleResolution from 'bundler' to 'NodeNext' is required for Prisma generated client imports to resolve at runtime; relative imports in new files must use .js extensions
npm install rewrites package.json with exact installed versions, so scripts and any manual dep additions must be applied after running npm install, not before

workflow: Build script should be 'prisma generate && tsc' so the generated Prisma client is always regenerated before TypeScript compilation
Prisma 7 db:push requires DATABASE_URL env var; wrapping in a script with a default (e.g. DATABASE_URL=~/.claude/hook-handler.db prisma db push) avoids manual env setup
WAL journal mode (PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL) should be enabled at DB open time via $executeRaw for safe concurrent writes with better-sqlite3
When migrating from NDJSON, running reconstruct after bulk insert rebuilds all derived state tables without needing a separate state migration

friction: Prisma 7 introduced multiple breaking changes from the plan's assumptions: datasource url removed from schema, driverAdapters preview feature removed — required discovering and creating prisma.config.ts mid-implementation
npm install silently overwrote package.json scripts, requiring a second edit pass to restore the correct build script
dirname import from wrong module (fs vs path) caused a clean-build failure that required diagnosis
open_items: React Native app with ActiveSessions component and single-session drill-down view — planned but not implemented (user interrupted)
Express/Hono API server to bridge SQLite DB to the React Native app — designed in plan but not started
The existing ~/claude-hooks.ndjson file is no longer needed but was not deleted; cleanup deferred
Plan file written to ~/.claude/plans/polished-waddling-pumpkin.md for the React Native implementation
